title: When you have a firm start date and need to adjust associated dates when that firm date changes.
excerpt: I have dashboards with multiple sections each with has a different “go live” weeks that associate back to a start date.  I am looking for a way to have a start date and then automate that when x date is changed y column …

posts.author: gdephillips (Gina DePhillips)
posts.cookedHtml: I have dashboards with multiple sections each with has a different “go live” weeks that associate back to a start date. I am looking for a way to have a start date and then automate that when x date is changed y column adjusts to x - 18 weeks (example)n

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Gina,

You can do that with the Advanced Formula Booster. It is a 3rd-party app that allows you to create formulas that cast their results to any type of column.
